title: NYC screening of EoE subbed
wikitext:
[]: NYC screening of EoE subbed             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Oct 12, 2016 9:31 pm Hey, folks! Wanted to spread the word about this in case it wasn't mentioned yet: tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com')) The source: tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com')) (Ahh...I'm rusty on what goes into what subforum these days... )

[]: Re: NYC screening of EoE subbed             Quote Post by Dojyaaaan » Thu Oct 13, 2016 7:17 pm Ah. That's awesome. Too bad I'll be in NJ by that time.

[]: Re: NYC screening of EoE subbed             Quote Post by Ray » Thu Oct 13, 2016 7:42 pm I guess that means a release of the original Manga Entertainment dub, or ( the preferable option) a complete redubs isn't going to happen anytime soon?

[]: Re: NYC screening of EoE subbed             Quote Post by Director Black » Thu Oct 13, 2016 7:47 pm This year just keeps getting better 4 me. After seeing it on my computer, phone and TV, I finally get to see EoE the way it was meant to be: watching the beautiful images was over me in a big screen in the very early morning.

[]: Re: NYC screening of EoE subbed             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Thu Oct 13, 2016 7:58 pm I wonder if it's just gonna be a projection from the POS Manga Entertainment DVD.

[]: Re: NYC screening of EoE subbed             Quote Post by Director Black » Thu Oct 13, 2016 8:04 pm Oh, and they're also showing Perfect Blue?? Paranoia Agent is one of my all-time favorite anime after all, but I really need to see more of what Satoshi Kon has to offer. It's too bad that they're not playing Millenium Actress. That's the one I'm really interested in seeing.
